title: Top College for B.Sc (Hons.) Physics in Noida, Uttar Pradesh
content: A Batchelor of Science (B.Sc.) in Physics is a degree offered for 3 years that can provide the career for students in various fields which includes higher education, scientific laboratories, industry, government sectors and other related discipline. The different courses offered for this degree focus on the fundamentals of physics and some interdisciplinary courses. In addition to that, the ability enhancement, value added and skill enhancement courses are also included to inculcate the students in various domain of their interest alongwith the core courses of Physics. Class XII with Science, including Physics as one of the subject, with a minimum aggregate of 50% marks. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) in Physics Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or equivalent 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 01 Be successful professionals in Academia, Industry, Government and Entrepreneurship. 02 Pursue higher education/research at Institute of National and International repute. 03 Effectively address the challenges of the society and undertake the projects for bridging the gap between industry and societal needs. 01 Understand, analyze and demonstrate the knowledge of electronics devices and materials to design a variety of components and systems to solve real world problems. 02 Perform high quality research in the area of interest and publish it in reputed Journals. Class XII with Science, including Physics as one of the subject, with a minimum aggregate of 50% marks. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) in Physics Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or equivalent 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks.
